slots: Reach Karnala from Mumbai or Pune in under two hours. Start on the lower loop for racket-tailed drongos, sunbirds, and the calls of Malabar whistling thrush.
The trail to Karnala fort pinnacle steepens through shaded gullies — monsoon brings butterflies; winter offers clearer ridge views.
Stay near Panvel or Lonavala if planning a dawn birding start tomorrow — traffic on the expressway peaks on weekends.
